# 1.1 Legislative DTOs

Part of [Component 1 — repcheck-shared-models](../01-SHARED-MODELS.md)

## Classes to Migrate (from `gov-apis` module)

| Existing Class | Source Package | Migration Notes |
|---------------|---------------|-----------------|
| `LegislativeBillDTO` | `congress.gov.DTOs` | Rename to `BillListItemDTO`. Fields: congress, billId, billType, latestAction, originChamber, originChamberCode, title, updateDate, updateDateIncludingText, url |
| `LegislativeBillsDTO` | `congress.gov.DTOs` | Rename to `BillListResponseDTO`. Wrapper with `PagedObject` + `Semigroup` |
| `LatestAction` | `congress.gov.DTOs` | Move as-is: `LatestActionDTO`. Fields: actionDate, text |
| `BillTypes` | `congress.gov.DTOs` | Move as-is. Enum with 13 cases + `fromString` parser |
| `BillTextLinksDTO` | `congress.gov.DTOs.Internal` | Move as-is. Wrapper over `TextVersion` list |
| `TextVersion` | `congress.gov.DTOs.Internal` | Move as-is. Fields: date, formats |
| `TextVersions` | `congress.gov.DTOs.Internal` | Move as-is. Inner wrapper |
| `Format` | `congress.gov.DTOs.Internal` | Move as-is. Fields: formatType, url |
| `FormatType` | `congress.gov.DTOs.Internal` | Move as-is. Enum: formattedText, pdf, formattedXml |
| `LegislativeBillDTOGovSite` | `congress.gov.DTOs.GovSite` | Move as-is. External API shape decoder |
| `BillTextLinksDTOGovSite` | `congress.gov.DTOs.GovSite` | Move as-is. External API shape decoder |
| `PagedObject` | `apiBase` | Move as-is. Trait with `lengthRetrieved: Int` |

## New Classes (from Congress.gov OpenAPI spec)

**Bill detail DTOs:**

| Class | Fields | Source Schema |
|-------|--------|---------------|
| `BillDetailDTO` | actions, committees, congress, introducedDate, latestAction, legislationUrl, number, originChamber, originChamberCode, policyArea, sponsors, cosponsors, subjects, summaries, textVersions, titles, type, updateDate, updateDateIncludingText, constitutionalAuthorityStatementText, cboCostEstimates, committeeReports, relatedBills | `BillDetail` + `LawNumber` |
| `SponsorDTO` | bioguideId, firstName, lastName, fullName, middleName, isByRequest, party, state, url | `Sponsor` |
| `CoSponsorDTO` | bioguideId, district, firstName, fullName, isOriginalCosponsor, lastName, party, sponsorshipDate, state, url | `CoSponsor` |
| `BillActionDTO` | actionCode, actionDate, sourceSystem (code + name), text, type | `Actions` |
| `BillSubjectsDTO` | legislativeSubjects: List[LegislativeSubjectDTO], policyArea: String | `Subjects` |
| `LegislativeSubjectDTO` | name, updateDate | `legislativeSubjects` |
| `BillSummaryDTO` | actionDate, actionDesc, text, updateDate, versionCode | `billSummariesArray` |
| `RelatedBillDTO` | congress, number, latestAction, relationshipDetails: List[RelationshipDetailDTO] | `RelatedBills` |
| `RelationshipDetailDTO` | identifiedBy, type | `relationshipDetails` |
| `CboCostEstimateDTO` | description, pubDate, title, url | `cboCost` |
| `CommitteeReportDTO` | citation, url | `committeeReport` |
| `TitleDTO` | title, updateDate, titleType, titleTypeCode, billTextVersionCode, billTextVersionName | `titlesArray` |

| Class | Fields | Source Schema |
|-------|--------|---------------|
| `MemberListItemDTO` | bioguideId, name, partyName, state, depiction (imageUrl + attribution), terms (List[MemberTermSummaryDTO]), updateDate, url | `Members` |
| `MemberDetailDTO` | bioguideId, birthYear, firstName, lastName, directOrderName, invertedOrderName, honorificName, cosponsoredLegislation, depiction, leadership, partyHistory, sponsoredLegislation, state, terms (List[MemberDetailTermDTO]), updateDate | `Member` |
| `MemberTermSummaryDTO` | chamber, startYear | `memberTerms` |

| `MemberDepictionDTO` | imageUrl, attribution | nested in `Members`/`Member` |

**Vote DTOs — Unified (chamber-agnostic):**

Vote DTOs are chamber-agnostic. House data from Congress.gov `/v3/house-vote` JSON. Senate data from senate.gov XML feeds (`/legislative/LIS/roll_call_votes/`). Both map to same unified DTO types; `chamber` field distinguishes House vs Senate.

*House source DTOs (from Congress.gov JSON API):*

| Class | Fields | Source Schema |
|-------|--------|---------------|
| `VoteListItemDTO` | congress, chamber, identifier, rollCallNumber, sessionNumber, startDate, updateDate, result, voteType, legislationNumber, legislationType, legislationUrl, url, sourceDataURL | `HouseVote` (House JSON) / Senate vote XML |
| `VoteDetailDTO` | all VoteListItemDTO fields + voteQuestion, votePartyTotal: List[VotePartyTotalDTO] | `HouseVoteNumber` (House JSON) / Senate vote XML |
| `VoteMembersDTO` | all VoteListItemDTO fields + voteQuestion, results: List[VoteResultDTO] | `HouseVoteMembers` (House JSON) / Senate vote XML |
| `VoteResultDTO` | memberId (bioguideId), firstName, lastName, voteCast, party, state | `houseVoteResults` (House JSON) / Senate vote XML member entries |
| `VotePartyTotalDTO` | voteParty, party (name + type), yeaTotal, nayTotal, presentTotal, notVotingTotal | `voteParty` (House JSON only — Senate XML computed from member positions) |

*Senate XML source DTOs:*

| Class | Fields | Source |
|-------|--------|--------|
| `SenateVoteXmlDTO` | congress, session, voteNumber, question, voteDate, result, members: List[SenateVoteMemberXmlDTO] | Senate vote XML root |
| `SenateVoteMemberXmlDTO` | lisMemberId, firstName, lastName, party, state, voteCast, memberFull | Senate vote XML `<member>` element |
| `SenateMemberContactDTO` | bioguideId, firstName, lastName, party, state, senateClass, address, phone, website | Senate contact XML |
| `SenatorLookupXmlDTO` | lisId, bioguideId, firstName, lastName, party, state, senateClass, serviceDates: List[ServicePeriodDTO], isCurrent: Boolean | Senator lookup XML (`/about/senator-lookup.xml`) — primary LIS-to-bioguide mapping source |
| `ServicePeriodDTO` | congress, startDate, endDate | Nested under `SenatorLookupXmlDTO` |

*LIS-to-bioguide mapping:*

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `LisMemberMappingDO` | lisMemberId (PK), memberId (FK → members), lastVerified | Maps senate.gov `lis_member_id` (e.g., "S428") to Congress.gov `bioguideId`. Populated daily by members-pipeline (Component 5) from `https://www.senate.gov/about/senator-lookup.xml`. Covers all senators (current and historical), including those with no committee assignments. Committee XML (§1.3) provides supplementary mappings but cannot be primary source. |

**Conversion flow for Senate votes:** `SenateVoteXmlDTO` → resolve each `SenateVoteMemberXmlDTO.lisMemberId` to `bioguideId` via `lis_member_mapping` table → produce unified `VoteMembersDTO` with `memberId = bioguideId`. Missing `lis_member_id` mappings flagged for manual review.

**Amendment DTOs:**

| Class | Fields | Source Schema |
|-------|--------|---------------|
| `AmendmentListItemDTO` | congress, number, type, description, latestAction, updateDate, url | `Amendments` |
| `AmendmentDetailDTO` | actions, amendedBill, chamber, congress, number, sponsors, submittedDate, textVersions, type, updateDate | `AmendmentNumber` |
| `AmendedBillDTO` | congress, number, originChamber, originChamberCode, title, type, updateDateIncludingText, url | `amendedBill` |

**Shared infrastructure DTOs:**

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `PaginationInfoDTO` | count: Int, url: String | Reusable nested object for sub-resource counts |
| `ApiListResponseDTO[T]` | items: List[T], pagination: PaginationMetadata | Generic paginated list response wrapper |

## Acceptance Criteria — 1.1 Legislative DTOs

**Functional:**
1. Every DTO has Circe semi-auto derived `Decoder` and `Encoder` (given instances).
2. Every DTO decoder successfully round-trips: `encode(dto).as[DTO] == Right(dto)` for all fields populated.
3. Every DTO decoder handles missing optional fields gracefully (decodes to `None` or default).
4. `BillListItemDTO` decoder handles both internal shape (from `LegislativeBillDTOGovSite`) and standard API shape.
5. `BillTypes.fromString` parses all 13 known bill type codes; returns `Left` for unknown values.
6. `FormatType.fromString` parses all 3 known format types; returns `Left` for unknown values.
7. `PagedObject` trait implemented by all list-level response DTOs (bills, members, votes, amendments, text links).
8. `Semigroup` instance exists for all paginated response DTOs, combining pages by concatenating items.

**Error Handling:**
9. DTO decoders produce descriptive `DecodingFailure` messages including field name and expected type.
10. Enum `fromString` methods return `Either[UnrecognizedXxx, Xxx]` with unrecognized input string in error.

**Test Requirements:**
11. Unit tests for every DTO decoder using sample JSON from Congress.gov OpenAPI spec examples.
12. Round-trip property: `decode(encode(x)) == Right(x)` for each DTO with all fields populated.
13. Missing-field tests: decode JSON with each optional field omitted, verify success.
14. Unknown-field tests: decode JSON with extra fields not in DTO, verify success (Circe default).
15. `BillTypes` and `FormatType` enum tests: every known value parses correctly, unknown values return error with context.
16. `Semigroup` tests: combining two pages produces page with concatenated items and correct `lengthRetrieved`.
